mapper.update:
UPDATE user
height_cm = #{height}, waist_cm = #{waist}, leg_length_cm = #{leg},
WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT oi.sku_id AS skuId, oi.sku_title AS title, SUM(oi.quantity) AS buyCount FROM user u JOIN order_info o ON o.user_id = u.id AND o.deleted = 0 JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND ABS(u.height_cm - #{height}) <= 5 AND ABS(u.waist_cm - #{waist}) <= 3 AND o.status IN ('PAID','SHIPPED','FINISHED') GROUP BY oi.sku_id, oi.sku_title ORDER BY buyCount DESC LIMIT 10
